title: Negative Numbers
summary: Negative numbers represent quantities below zero, opposite directions, deficits, or signed change.
claim: Negative numbers represent quantities below a defined zero point, directed opposites, deficits, or inverse positions on an ordered scale.
proof: A number line with a zero reference permits positions on opposite sides. Addition and subtraction preserve consistent movement across that line.
validation: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic systems that include signed quantities.
reconstruction: Can be rediscovered through debt, direction, temperature scale offsets, or positions relative to zero.
